flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 20% at SUNY College at Geneseo vs the 2018–2022 baseline (3.9k vs 4.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at SUNY College at Geneseo rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.6k → $6.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at SUNY College at Geneseo fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (4.4k → 3.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at SUNY College at Geneseo vs the 2003–2007 baseline (72.1% vs 79.0%).
